company.name: InFeed
company.what_it_is: Subscription-based service that surfaces relevant finance roles and handles the entire application process on behalf of users
company.what_it_is_not: Not a job board — a curated pipeline product built around each candidate's trajectory

audiences.description: Seeking internships and entry-level roles in high finance
Looking for relevant openings in a structured, discreet way

services.name: Intelligence pipeline
services.description: Surfaces relevant, often unadvertised roles filtered to the lead's background and goals

services.name: Backend application execution
services.description: Handles CV tailoring, cover letter writing, and submission — user picks positions, we do the rest

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.includes: Tailored setup for larger or customised needs

_senders_help: Array of HeyReach linkedInAccountId values belonging to this business. Webhooks and poller messages from these senders will be routed to this workspace. Add your HeyReach account IDs here. Example: ["7f3c2a1b-...", "8e4d3b2c-..."]
differentiators: Curated, not aggregated — roles matched to candidate trajectory
Full application execution, not just listings
Handles the tedious backend so candidates focus on decisions

pricing_rules.never_mention_before: lead has engaged with the value offering
pricing_rules.framing: Ongoing workflow subscription, not a one-off purchase

messaging.voice: Peer who happens to know about great opportunities — not a recruiter, not a salesperson
opener_examples: PE still on your radar this year?
LBS this season — finance or strategy?
value_examples: Here's 14 PE roles for your background: [link]. We handle the applications too — CV, cover letter, submission.
Pulled a list that fits: [link]. We take care of the application side if you want to move on any.
forbidden_phrases: I hope this message finds you well
Please let me know if you have any questions

avatars.name: Student
avatars.description: University student targeting internships or entry-level roles in high finance
pain_points: CV tailoring per firm is time-consuming
avatars.messaging_angle: Peer who already knows which roles are open and handles the application grind for you

avatars.name: Intern
avatars.description: Current or recent intern looking to convert or land next role
avatars.messaging_angle: We surface roles and handle applications while you focus on your current seat

avatars.name: Analyst
avatars.description: Junior analyst (1-3 years) looking for next move
avatars.messaging_angle: Discreet, curated roles matched to your background — we do the legwork

avatars.name: Associate
avatars.description: Mid-level professional (3-6 years) exploring selective next steps
pain_points: Only moves for the right opportunity
avatars.messaging_angle: Relevant, selective opportunities matched to where you are — no noise

avatars.name: Senior Professional
avatars.description: VP+ level — values discretion above all
avatars.messaging_angle: Relevant senior-level roles, surfaced discreetly. No noise.
